framework.name: Click-to-Buy vs Delegate-to-Buy Paradigm Shift
framework.description: The fundamental transition from direct human purchase decisions (clicking to buy) to delegated AI agent purchase decisions (delegate to buy), where AI agents complete transactions autonomously on behalf of consumers.
framework.raw_quote: We're moving from a click to buy to a delegate delegate to buy paradigm. So AI agents aren't just basically recommending products at this point in a chat session. They're completing transactions on your behalf.

source.title: The Race to Standardize Agentic Commerce
